userStories.title: Excalidraw-Style Layout
userStories.description: Redesign the entire layout to match Excalidraw: remove the left sidebar toolbar, replace with a top-centered floating toolbar with white semi-transparent background, rounded corners, and subtle shadow. Move room info/user count/zoom to bottom-right floating panel. Remove the right-side properties panel. Maximize canvas area.
acceptanceCriteria: Canvas area occupies almost entire viewport (only top toolbar takes space)
Left sidebar toolbar completely removed
Top-centered floating toolbar with white semi-transparent background, rounded corners, subtle shadow
Toolbar centered horizontally, ~12px from top
Room info (room ID, share button, user count, zoom) moved to bottom-right floating panel
Toolbar supports minimize/hide toggle
Clicking empty canvas does not accidentally trigger toolbar interactions
Old right-side PropertiesPanel removed

userStories.title: Yellow Color Theme
userStories.description: Apply a warm light yellow color theme throughout the application. Canvas background changes from white to light yellow. Toolbar, buttons, and all UI elements follow the same yellow palette. Text colors adjusted for contrast.
acceptanceCriteria: Canvas background changed to light yellow (#FFFEF0 or #FFF8E7)
Toolbar background: very light yellow (#FFFDF5) with 92% opacity
Tool button active state: yellow highlight (#FFF3C4)
Tool button hover state: light yellow background
Shape default stroke color remains black (sufficient contrast on yellow)
Bottom info panel uses same yellow theme as toolbar
Global text color adjusted to dark gray (#333) instead of pure black
All buttons, inputs, modals follow the same color scheme
Remote user cursor colors remain visible on yellow background
Theme colors managed via TailwindCSS custom variables

userStories.title: Complete Button Functions with Keyboard Shortcuts
userStories.description: Implement all toolbar buttons with full functionality and keyboard shortcuts. Select (V/1), Rectangle (R/2), Ellipse (O/3), Line (L/4), Freehand (P/5), Eraser (X/7). Include Ctrl+Z/Y undo/redo, Delete to remove, Escape to deselect, Ctrl+A select all. Each button shows tooltip with shortcut.
acceptanceCriteria: Select tool (V/1): click to select, drag to move, resize handles, Delete to remove, Escape to deselect, Ctrl+A select all
Rectangle tool (R/2): click and drag to draw, preview during drawing, auto-select after creation
Ellipse tool (O/3): click and drag to draw, preview during drawing, auto-select after creation
Line tool (L/4): click and drag to draw straight line, preview during drawing
Freehand tool (P/5): hold and drag for freehand curves, release to finish
Eraser tool (X/7): click or drag to delete shapes, cursor shows eraser icon
Current active tool visually highlighted
Keyboard shortcuts work in all contexts
Tooltip or small text shows shortcut on each button
Clear Canvas button with confirmation dialog

userStories.title: Double-Click Text Editing
userStories.description: Remove the separate Text tool button from toolbar. Instead, double-clicking anywhere on the canvas opens an inline text editor. Text shapes can be edited by double-clicking existing text. No dedicated text tool needed.
acceptanceCriteria: Double-click on empty canvas area opens inline text editor
Text editor: white background, light yellow border, auto-focused cursor
Press Enter or click elsewhere to confirm text
Confirmed text becomes a text shape (selectable, movable, resizable)
Text shape displays as borderless text (Excalidraw style)
Double-click existing text shape enters edit mode
Escape cancels editing without creating text
Empty text does not create a shape
Default font: 20px system sans-serif, dark gray
Text editor supports multi-line input
No standalone Text tool button in toolbar
Double-click does not conflict with shape dragging in Select mode

userStories.title: Properties Panel Integration
userStories.description: When a shape is selected, show styling controls contextually below the toolbar (second floating row). Controls include: stroke color (8 presets + custom), fill color (8 presets + custom + none), stroke width (3 options), stroke style (solid/dashed), fill style (none/solid/hatch). When no shape selected, controls set defaults for new shapes.
acceptanceCriteria: Selecting a shape expands toolbar or shows second floating panel below it
Stroke color: 8 preset color swatches + custom color picker (black, red, blue, green, purple, orange, brown, gray)
Fill color: 8 preset swatches + custom picker + none option
Stroke width: 3 visual options (thin/medium/thick) with icon representation
Stroke style: solid/dashed toggle buttons
Fill style: none/solid/hatch toggle buttons
When no shape selected, controls set default style for new shapes
When shape selected, modifying properties immediately updates that shape
Properties panel follows same yellow theme
Smooth transition animation for panel show/hide
